---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for FinAI Research Workflow
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

<!-- One-sentence description of the feature. -->

## Problem It Solves

<!-- What user problem does this address? Why is it important? -->

For example:
- As a [user type], I want to [action], so that [benefit].

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the API/CLI/UI changes you'd like to see. -->

```python
# Example usage
result = finai.some_new_method(...)
```

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider, and why is this one better? -->

## Use Case

<!-- A concrete research scenario where this would be useful. -->

For example: *"I'm writing a paper on carbon trading policy... I need X to do Y faster."*

## Implementation Effort

<!-- Optional: rough estimate. Low / Medium / High. -->

## Related Work

- Papers: [arXiv links]
- Tools: [GitHub repos]
- Discussions: #issue-numbers

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched the [existing issues](https://github.com/csmar432/finai-research/issues?q=is%3Aissue+label%3Aenhancement) to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This is a feature for the *workflow / research methodology* (not just a personal script)
- [ ] It would benefit at least 10 other researchers
